recordType.title: Record type
recordType.description: The kind of row written by the Actor.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: The Actor mode that produced this row.

source.title: Source
source.description: ScriptureFlow source metadata for the row, including endpoint, documentation URL, CTA URL, and retrieval time.

translationId.title: Translation ID
translationId.description: ScriptureFlow translation key, such as en-kjv.

reference.title: Reference
reference.description: Resolved Scripture reference for verse rows.

inputReference.title: Input reference
inputReference.description: Reference string originally supplied by the user.

normalizedReference.title: Normalized reference
normalizedReference.description: Reference resolved by ScriptureFlow validation mode.

book.title: Book
book.description: Resolved Bible book identifier returned by ScriptureFlow.

bookSlug.title: Book slug
bookSlug.description: Book slug returned by ScriptureFlow when available.

canonicalBook.title: Canonical book
canonicalBook.description: Canonical book key returned by ScriptureFlow when available.

text.title: Scripture text
text.description: Verse text returned by ScriptureFlow for passage mode.
text.example: For God so loved the world...

valid.title: Valid
valid.description: Whether the row represents a valid resolved reference or user-error result.

errorCode.title: Error code
errorCode.description: Structured error code for user/input error rows.

message.title: Message
message.description: Human-readable error message for error rows.

status.title: Status
status.description: Translation status for catalog rows, or HTTP status for error rows.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Optional non-text metadata such as source path, API path, ID, and input reference.

languageCode.title: Language code
languageCode.description: Language code returned in catalog rows.

translationName.title: Translation name
translationName.description: Human-readable translation name returned in catalog rows.

booksFound.title: Books found
booksFound.description: Number of books found in catalog metadata.

chaptersFound.title: Chapters found
chaptersFound.description: Number of chapters found in catalog metadata or for a book metadata row.

firstChapter.title: First chapter
firstChapter.description: Lowest chapter number found for a book metadata row.

lastChapter.title: Last chapter
lastChapter.description: Highest chapter number found for a book metadata row.

totalVerses.title: Total verses
totalVerses.description: Sum of chapter verse counts for a book metadata row when available.

versesFound.title: Verses found
versesFound.description: Number of verses found in catalog metadata.

versesIndexType.title: Verse index type
versesIndexType.description: Catalog metadata describing the available ScriptureFlow index format.

details.title: Error details
details.description: Raw details returned with a structured user/input error when available.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Practical fields for translation, book metadata, verse, validation, and error rows.
